hooks.command: bash -c 'FLAG="/tmp/.ember_$(echo "$PWD" | md5sum | cut -c1-8)"; if [ ! -f "$FLAG" ] && [ -f "SESSION.md" ]; then touch "$FLAG"; echo "<session-context>"; cat SESSION.md; echo "</session-context>"; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -f "SESSION.md" ]; then echo "Run /session-end to update SESSION.md and commit."; fi'
